transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, First National Bank. I'm Kenji. Can I take your full name and date of birth for security?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi, yeah — it's Louise Drummond, sixteenth of February 1988.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Louise, you're verified. What can I help with today?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: So this is going to sound weird, but the cash machine shortchanged me. I asked for two-fifty and it only gave me two hundred. And it didn't give me a receipt.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That doesn't sound weird at all — I'm sorry that happened. Do you have the location of the ATM and roughly what time?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes, it's outside the Boots on Crown Street. It was at 9:17 this morning — I've got it on my phone.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect — that timestamp will really help us pinpoint the machine's transaction log. I'm raising a cash discrepancy report right now. Reference ATM-2024-3551. The machine will be audited within two working days and if the discrepancy is confirmed, fifty pounds will be refunded to your account automatically.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: And what if the audit doesn't show anything?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Our ATM investigations team will review transaction records and CCTV as a next step. Either way your case is formally logged and we will follow up. You'll receive a confirmation by email.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: That's really good to know. Thank you Kenji.
